entities.name: MILLET
entities.description: A climate-resilient whole grain crop with high nutrient density

entities.name: WHOLE GRAIN
entities.description: Grains that contain all the original parts of the seed

entities.name: NUTRIENT DENSITY
entities.description: The amount of beneficial nutrients per unit of food energy

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: A staple cereal grain used for comparison with millets

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A staple cereal grain used for comparison with millets

entities.name: CLIMATE RESILIENCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop to withstand adverse climatic conditions

entities.name: DIET-RESPONSIVE DISEASES
entities.description: Health conditions that can be influenced or reduced by dietary changes

entities.name: CHILDHOOD STUNTING
entities.description: Impaired growth and development in children due to poor nutrition

entities.name: ANEMIA
entities.description: A condition marked by a deficiency of red blood cells or hemoglobin

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where diet-responsive diseases like stunting and anemia are highly prevalent

entities.name: OBESITY
entities.description: A complex disease involving an excessive amount of body fat

entities.name: CARDIOVASCULAR DISEASES
entities.description: Diseases affecting the heart and blood vessels

entities.name: TYPE 2 DIABETES
entities.description: A chronic condition that affects the way the body processes blood sugar

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL COMPOSITION
entities.description: The specific makeup of nutrients within a crop species

entities.name: NUTRIENT BIOAVAILABILITY
entities.description: The proportion of a nutrient that is absorbed and utilized by the body

entities.name: FOOD PROCESSING
entities.description: The transformation of raw ingredients into food

entities.name: COOKING
entities.description: The process of preparing food by applying heat

entities.name: META-ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical analysis that combines the results of multiple scientific studies

entities.name: INTERVENTION STUDIES
entities.description: Research where participants are assigned to an intervention to measure its effect

entities.name: EXPERIMENTAL DESIGNS
entities.description: The structured approach used to conduct scientific experiments
